TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fengbin mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 157.26 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 61.89 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 12.67 km²), 4,464 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,704 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,695 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 83%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Kebalan, Sakizaya, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Fengbin ays psgayun 5 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Laeno , Makotaay , Tida'an , Kodic , Fakong , Haciliwan , Tingalaw , Tisilan , Tafugan , Cawi , Malaloong , Dipit , Paterungan , Kaluluwan , Culiu .
S.PHON: *eŋβin mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ, keβalan, s~ɕakizaja, βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu *eŋβin ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, laeno , makotaaj , ti*aʔan , ko*iʦ~ʨ , *akoŋ , ħaʦ~ʨiliwan , tiŋalaw , tis~ɕilan , ta*uɣan , ʦ~ʨawi , malalooŋ , *ipit , pateruŋan , kaluluwan , ʦ~ʨuliu .
S.FORM: Fengbin mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 157.26 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 61.89 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 12.67 km²), 4,464 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,704 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,695 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 83%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Kebalan, Sakizaya, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Fengbin ays psgayun 5 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Laeno , Makotaay , Tida'an , Kodic , Fakong , Haciliwan , Tingalaw , Tisilan , Tafugan , Cawi , Malaloong , Dipit , Paterungan , Kaluluwan , Culiu .
S.PHON: *eŋβin mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ, keβalan, s~ɕakizaja, βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu *eŋβin ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, laeno , makotaaj , ti*aʔan , ko*iʦ~ʨ , *akoŋ , ħaʦ~ʨiliwan , tiŋalaw , tis~ɕilan , ta*uɣan , ʦ~ʨawi , malalooŋ , *ipit , pateruŋan , kaluluwan , ʦ~ʨuliu .
